requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — ICONTEC NTC Standards (CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 Harmonised Equivalents)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC辐射发射——ICONTEC NTC标准（CISPR 32 / IEC 55032协调等效标准）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC輻射發射——ICONTEC NTC標準（CISPR 32 / IEC 55032協調等效標準）

summary.en: Colombia adopts international IEC and CISPR standards through ICONTEC (Instituto Colombiano de Normas Técnicas y Certificación), which publishes corresponding NTC (Norma Técnica Colombiana) standards. For multimedia and information-technology equipment — the primary category covering Wi-Fi routers, smart speakers, IoT hubs, and similar devices — the applicable emissions standard is the NTC equivalent of CISPR 32 (covering radiated and conducted emissions limits). EMC emissions compliance evidence is expected as part of the CRC homologación technical dossier. Test reports from ILAC-accredited laboratories against CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 are the preferred submission format; IEC/EN reports from CE-mark testing may be used as a starting basis. Colombia does not operate a standalone EMC self-declaration scheme separate from the CRC homologación process.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚通过ICONTEC（哥伦比亚标准与认证研究所）采用IEC和CISPR国际标准，并发布相应的NTC（哥伦比亚技术标准）。对于多媒体和信息技术设备——涵盖Wi-Fi路由器、智能音箱、物联网集线器及类似设备的主要类别——适用发射标准为CISPR 32的NTC等效标准（涵盖辐射和传导发射限值）。EMC发射合规证明须作为CRC型式认可技术文件的一部分提交。ILAC认可实验室按CISPR 32 / IEC 55032出具的检测报告为首选提交格式；CE标志检测中的IEC/EN报告可作为起点。哥伦比亚不在CRC型式认可程序之外单独运行EMC自声明机制。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞通過ICONTEC（哥倫比亞標準與認證研究所）採用IEC和CISPR國際標準，並發布相應的NTC（哥倫比亞技術標準）。對於多媒體和資訊技術設備——涵蓋Wi-Fi路由器、智慧音箱、物聯網集線器及類似裝置的主要類別——適用發射標準為CISPR 32的NTC等效標準（涵蓋輻射和傳導發射限值）。EMC發射合規證明須作為CRC型式認可技術文件的一部分提交。ILAC認可實驗室按CISPR 32 / IEC 55032出具的檢測報告為首選提交格式；CE標誌檢測中的IEC/EN報告可作為起點。哥倫比亞不在CRC型式認可程序之外單獨運行EMC自聲明機制。

standards_or_laws: ICONTEC NTC equivalent of CISPR 32 (IEC 55032) — electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment, emissions requirements
ICONTEC (Instituto Colombiano de Normas Técnicas y Certificación) — Colombian national standards body publishing NTC harmonised standards
CRC homologación technical dossier — EMC emissions test reports required as part of type-approval submission
ILAC-accredited laboratory test reports — preferred format for CRC homologación EMC submissions

summary.en: In China, EMC emissions compliance for information technology and multimedia equipment is governed primarily by GB/T 9254 (harmonising CISPR 22 / CISPR 32) for Class A and Class B radiated and conducted emissions, and GB 17625.1 (harmonising IEC 61000-3-2) for harmonic current emissions. GB/T 9254 compliance is assessed as part of the CCC process for in-scope products and as a voluntary standard for others. While Chinese GB EMC standards are technically similar in structure to CISPR 32, they use Chinese administrative procedures and CNCA-authorised laboratories. Chinese CCC EMC certificates and GB/T 9254 test reports are not directly accepted by the CRC as satisfying ICONTEC NTC / CISPR 32 requirements. If the Chinese testing laboratory holds ILAC accreditation and the test parameters align with the applicable CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 limits, partial data reuse may be possible — but must be confirmed with the CRC submission authority.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术和多媒体设备的EMC辐射发射合规主要受GB/T 9254（对应CISPR 22 / CISPR 32）约束，适用A级和B级辐射及传导发射限值；谐波电流发射则受GB 17625.1（对应IEC 61000-3-2）约束。GB/T 9254合规作为范围内产品CCC程序的一部分进行评估，对其他产品则作为自愿性标准。尽管中国GB EMC标准在结构上与CISPR 32技术上类似，但采用中国行政程序和CNCA认可实验室。中国CCC EMC证书和GB/T 9254检测报告不被CRC直接接受为满足ICONTEC NTC / CISPR 32要求。若中国检测实验室持有ILAC认可资质且检测参数与适用CISPR 32 / IEC 55032限值一致，则部分数据复用或可行——但须向CRC提交机构确认。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術和多媒體設備的EMC輻射發射合規主要受GB/T 9254（對應CISPR 22 / CISPR 32）約束，適用A級和B級輻射及傳導發射限值；諧波電流發射則受GB 17625.1（對應IEC 61000-3-2）約束。GB/T 9254合規作為範圍內產品CCC程序的一部分進行評估，對其他產品則作為自願性標準。儘管中國GB EMC標準在結構上與CISPR 32技術上類似，但採用中國行政程序和CNCA認可實驗室。中國CCC EMC證書和GB/T 9254檢測報告不被CRC直接接受為滿足ICONTEC NTC / CISPR 32要求。若中國檢測實驗室持有ILAC認可資質且檢測參數與適用CISPR 32 / IEC 55032限值一致，則部分數據複用或可行——但須向CRC提交機構確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 (harmonises CISPR 22/32) — China EMC emissions standard for IT and multimedia equipment
GB 17625.1 (harmonises IEC 61000-3-2) — China harmonic current emission limits
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — includes EMC testing by CNCA-authorised labs for in-scope product categories

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 EMC test reports and CCC EMC certificates are not directly accepted by the CRC as satisfying ICONTEC NTC / CISPR 32 requirements. EMC emissions testing should be conducted by an ILAC-accredited laboratory against CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 limits and submitted as part of the CRC homologación dossier. If an existing Chinese test was performed at an ILAC-accredited facility with parameters matching the NTC/CISPR 32 scope, partial data reuse may reduce retesting costs — confirm acceptability with the CRC submission authority before relying on Chinese test data. CE-mark CISPR 32 reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory are generally better positioned for CRC acceptance than China-only GB/T 9254 reports.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254 EMC检测报告和CCC EMC证书不被CRC直接接受为满足ICONTEC NTC / CISPR 32要求。EMC发射检测应由ILAC认可实验室按CISPR 32 / IEC 55032限值进行，并作为CRC型式认可文件的一部分提交。若现有中国检测由ILAC认可机构在参数符合NTC/CISPR 32范围的条件下完成，部分数据复用可能降低重测成本——在依赖中国检测数据前须向CRC提交机构确认可接受性。来自ILAC认可实验室的CE标志CISPR 32报告通常比仅基于中国的GB/T 9254报告更易获得CRC认可。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254 EMC檢測報告和CCC EMC證書不被CRC直接接受為滿足ICONTEC NTC / CISPR 32要求。EMC發射檢測應由ILAC認可實驗室按CISPR 32 / IEC 55032限值進行，並作為CRC型式認可文件的一部分提交。若現有中國檢測由ILAC認可機構在參數符合NTC/CISPR 32範圍的條件下完成，部分數據複用可能降低重測成本——在依賴中國檢測數據前須向CRC提交機構確認可接受性。來自ILAC認可實驗室的CE標誌CISPR 32報告通常比僅基於中國的GB/T 9254報告更易獲得CRC認可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC emissions compliance (ICONTEC NTC / CISPR 32 equivalent) required as part of CRC homologación technical dossier; no standalone Colombian EMC self-declaration pathway
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-scope products; voluntary/recommended for others — GB/T 9254 governs EMC emissions in China

source.publisher: ICONTEC — Instituto Colombiano de Normas Técnicas y Certificación

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia adopts CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 EMC emissions requirements through ICONTEC NTC standards, evaluated as part of the CRC homologación process. Chinese GB/T 9254 test reports and CCC EMC certificates are not directly accepted. ILAC-accredited test data against CISPR 32 limits provides the best basis for CRC dossier acceptance. Verify applicable NTC standard editions and CRC test-report acceptance criteria with a qualified Colombian regulatory professional before engaging a laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚通过ICONTEC NTC标准采用CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 EMC发射要求，在CRC型式认可程序中进行评估。中国GB/T 9254检测报告和CCC EMC证书不被直接接受。ILAC认可实验室按CISPR 32限值出具的检测数据为CRC文件认可提供最佳基础。委托实验室前请向合格的哥伦比亚监管专业人士核验适用NTC标准版本和CRC检测报告认可标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞通過ICONTEC NTC標準採用CISPR 32 / IEC 55032 EMC發射要求，在CRC型式認可程序中進行評估。中國GB/T 9254檢測報告和CCC EMC證書不被直接接受。ILAC認可實驗室按CISPR 32限值出具的檢測數據為CRC文件認可提供最佳基礎。委託實驗室前請向合格的哥倫比亞監管專業人士核驗適用NTC標準版本和CRC檢測報告認可標準。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — ICONTEC NTC / IEC 61000 Series

summary.en: For equipment sold in Colombia, EMC immunity requirements follow ICONTEC NTC standards harmonising the IEC 61000-4-x series, covering immunity to electrostatic discharge (ESD), electrical fast transients, surge, conducted and radiated RF immunity, and voltage dips and interruptions. Immunity testing evidence is included as part of the CRC homologación technical dossier alongside emissions data. The applicable immunity standard for multimedia and IT equipment aligns with IEC 61000-6-1 or IEC 61000-6-3 generic immunity standards (for residential and light-industrial environments respectively) as adopted through ICONTEC NTC. Colombia does not operate a separate CE-style immunity self-declaration; immunity compliance is evaluated within the CRC type-approval process. Importantly, Colombia's 110–120 V / 60 Hz power supply differs from China's 220 V / 50 Hz — this affects surge (IEC 61000-4-5) and electrical-fast-transient (IEC 61000-4-4) test conditions, which must reflect Colombian mains parameters.
summary.zh: 在哥伦比亚销售的设备，EMC抗扰度要求遵循ICONTEC NTC标准（协调IEC 61000-4-x系列），涵盖对静电放电（ESD）、电快速瞬变脉冲群、浪涌、传导和辐射射频抗扰度以及电压暂降和中断的抗扰度。抗扰度检测证明与发射数据一起纳入CRC型式认可技术文件。多媒体和IT设备适用的抗扰度标准与通过ICONTEC NTC采用的IEC 61000-6-1或IEC 61000-6-3通用抗扰度标准（分别适用于住宅和轻工业环境）保持一致。哥伦比亚不在CRC型式认可程序之外单独运行类似CE的抗扰度自声明机制。重要的是，哥伦比亚110–120V/60Hz电源与中国220V/50Hz不同——这影响浪涌（IEC 61000-4-5）和电快速瞬变脉冲群（IEC 61000-4-4）测试条件，须反映哥伦比亚电网参数。
summary.zht: 在哥倫比亞銷售的設備，EMC抗擾度要求遵循ICONTEC NTC標準（協調IEC 61000-4-x系列），涵蓋對靜電放電（ESD）、電快速暫態脈衝群、突波、傳導和輻射射頻抗擾度以及電壓暫降和中斷的抗擾度。抗擾度檢測證明與發射數據一起納入CRC型式認可技術文件。多媒體和IT裝置適用的抗擾度標準與通過ICONTEC NTC採用的IEC 61000-6-1或IEC 61000-6-3通用抗擾度標準（分別適用於住宅和輕工業環境）保持一致。哥倫比亞不在CRC型式認可程序之外單獨運行類似CE的抗擾度自聲明機制。重要的是，哥倫比亞110–120V/60Hz電源與中國220V/50Hz不同——這影響突波（IEC 61000-4-5）和電快速暫態脈衝群（IEC 61000-4-4）測試條件，須反映哥倫比亞電網參數。

standards_or_laws: ICONTEC NTC equivalents of IEC 61000-4 series — EMC immunity test methods for Colombia
IEC 61000-6-1 / IEC 61000-6-3 — generic immunity standards for residential and light-industrial environments (adopted via ICONTEC NTC harmonisation)
CRC homologación technical dossier — immunity compliance assessed as part of Colombian type approval
Colombia 110–120 V / 60 Hz mains — affects surge and EFT test parameters relative to Chinese 220 V / 50 Hz baseline

summary.en: In China, EMC immunity requirements for information technology and multimedia equipment are governed by GB/T 17626 series (harmonising IEC 61000-4-x), covering ESD, electrical fast transients, surge, and RF immunity. GB/T 17626 immunity compliance is typically assessed as part of CCC for in-scope products and as a recommended requirement for others. While GB/T 17626 is technically aligned with IEC 61000-4, Chinese test reports and CCC records are not accepted by the CRC as satisfying Colombian ICONTEC NTC IEC 61000-series requirements. Additionally, Chinese test conditions use 220 V / 50 Hz mains parameters, which differ from Colombia's 110–120 V / 60 Hz supply — surge and EFT immunity test conditions may need to be adapted.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术和多媒体设备的EMC抗扰度要求受GB/T 17626系列（对应IEC 61000-4-x）约束，涵盖ESD、电快速瞬变脉冲群、浪涌和射频抗扰度。GB/T 17626抗扰度合规通常作为范围内产品CCC程序的一部分进行评估，对其他产品则作为推荐要求。尽管GB/T 17626在技术上与IEC 61000-4一致，但中国检测报告和CCC记录不被CRC接受为满足哥伦比亚ICONTEC NTC IEC 61000系列要求。此外，中国测试条件采用220V/50Hz电网参数，与哥伦比亚110–120V/60Hz电源不同——浪涌和EFT抗扰度测试条件可能需要适配。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術和多媒體設備的EMC抗擾度要求受GB/T 17626系列（對應IEC 61000-4-x）約束，涵蓋ESD、電快速暫態脈衝群、突波和射頻抗擾度。GB/T 17626抗擾度合規通常作為範圍內產品CCC程序的一部分進行評估，對其他產品則作為建議要求。儘管GB/T 17626在技術上與IEC 61000-4一致，但中國檢測報告和CCC記錄不被CRC接受為滿足哥倫比亞ICONTEC NTC IEC 61000系列要求。此外，中國測試條件採用220V/50Hz電網參數，與哥倫比亞110–120V/60Hz電源不同——突波和EFT抗擾度測試條件可能需要適配。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series (harmonises IEC 61000-4-x) — China EMC immunity test methods for IT and multimedia equipment
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — includes immunity testing by CNCA-authorised labs for in-scope product categories
China 220 V / 50 Hz mains standard — differs from Colombia 110–120 V / 60 Hz; affects surge and EFT test parameters

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 17626 EMC immunity test reports and CCC records are not accepted by the CRC as equivalent to ICONTEC NTC / IEC 61000-4-series testing. Immunity must be assessed under IEC 61000-4-x standards by an ILAC-accredited laboratory, with test conditions reflecting Colombia's 110–120 V / 60 Hz supply. No mutual recognition or test-report equivalence pathway exists between Colombia and China for EMC immunity. Exporters with existing CE-mark IEC 61000-4 immunity reports (conducted at an ILAC-accredited lab) are better positioned, as those reports align with the IEC 61000 framework adopted by ICONTEC — though CRC acceptance should still be confirmed.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17626 EMC抗扰度检测报告和CCC记录不被CRC接受为与ICONTEC NTC / IEC 61000-4系列检测等效。须由ILAC认可实验室在反映哥伦比亚110–120V/60Hz电源条件下按IEC 61000-4-x标准评估抗扰度。哥伦比亚与中国之间不存在EMC抗扰度的相互认可或报告等效路径。持有CE标志IEC 61000-4抗扰度报告（由ILAC认可实验室出具）的出口商处于更有利位置，因这些报告与ICONTEC采用的IEC 61000框架一致——但仍须确认CRC认可性。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17626 EMC抗擾度檢測報告和CCC記錄不被CRC接受為與ICONTEC NTC / IEC 61000-4系列檢測等效。須由ILAC認可實驗室在反映哥倫比亞110–120V/60Hz電源條件下按IEC 61000-4-x標準評估抗擾度。哥倫比亞與中國之間不存在EMC抗擾度的相互認可或報告等效路徑。持有CE標誌IEC 61000-4抗擾度報告（由ILAC認可實驗室出具）的出口商處於更有利位置，因這些報告與ICONTEC採用的IEC 61000框架一致——但仍須確認CRC認可性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC immunity to ICONTEC NTC / IEC 61000-4 series assessed as part of CRC homologación technical dossier; no standalone Colombian immunity self-declaration pathway
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for CCC-scope products; voluntary/recommended for others — GB/T 17626 governs EMC immunity in China

source.publisher: ICONTEC — Instituto Colombiano de Normas Técnicas y Certificación

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia assesses EMC immunity to the ICONTEC NTC / IEC 61000-4 series within the CRC homologación process. Chinese GB/T 17626 test reports and CCC records are not accepted as equivalent. Immunity test conditions must account for Colombia's 110–120 V / 60 Hz supply, which differs from China's 220 V / 50 Hz grid. Verify applicable ICONTEC NTC IEC 61000-series immunity standard editions and CRC dossier requirements with a qualified Colombian regulatory professional before engaging a laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚在CRC型式认可程序内按ICONTEC NTC / IEC 61000-4系列评估EMC抗扰度。中国GB/T 17626检测报告和CCC记录不被视为等效。抗扰度测试条件须考虑哥伦比亚110–120V/60Hz电源，与中国220V/50Hz电网不同。委托实验室前请向合格的哥伦比亚监管专业人士核验适用ICONTEC NTC IEC 61000系列抗扰度标准版本和CRC文件要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞在CRC型式認可程序內按ICONTEC NTC / IEC 61000-4系列評估EMC抗擾度。中國GB/T 17626檢測報告和CCC記錄不被視為等效。抗擾度測試條件須考慮哥倫比亞110–120V/60Hz電源，與中國220V/50Hz電網不同。委託實驗室前請向合格的哥倫比亞監管專業人士核驗適用ICONTEC NTC IEC 61000系列抗擾度標準版本和CRC文件要求。
